tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall policy
edit 2
set name "limit_ubuntu_egress"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "UbuntuHost"
set dstaddr "all"
set action accept
set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
set traffic-shaper "icmp_shaper"
set traffic-shaper-reverse "icmp_shaper"
set nat enable
set utm-status enable
set ips-sensor "default"
next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
